content.text:
Course:
English 2 (ENG2) — Semester 2, Unit UT2, Credits: 2, Coeff: 1
Course Objectives
Students should have the B2 level at the end of Semester 2.
Course Content
Speaking Skills
Listening Skills
Reading Skills
Writing Skills
Grammar and Vocabulary
Pronunciation
Teaching Mode
eLearning (100%)
Assessment Mode
Exam (100%)
Recommended Textbooks
“English File Upper-Intermediate” by Christina Latham-Koenig and Clive Oxenden
